campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to hear a financial report from the regional transit authority covering March 2026 investments, and to approve a new city policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities. The council also discussed efforts to fill open city positions and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority financial report for March 2026
New policy limiting city property use for federal civil enforcement
Open city job vacancies and staff recruitment efforts

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the County identified. The council voted to approve an official order requiring these properties to be cleaned up, and also passed a new city policy on how the city will handle technology disruption issues. They also established a formal process for residents to request accommodations and have those requests fairly reviewed.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement orders
New Technology Disruption Policy for the city
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several contracts and agreements. The council approved donations of emergency equipment, awarded a paving contract, and applied for state grants while planning projects for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillators
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Submitted state grant applications
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-27

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming council sessions and review work plans for different committees. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and discussed what items to add to the June 2 agenda, including updates to neighborhood services and education priorities.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning and new item submissions
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments from residents, and select applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas and reports from various city boards and committees.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for fiscal year 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
Review of upcoming board and committee agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular business and recognize two important community observances. The meeting highlighted Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month, drawing attention to these initiatives affecting local residents.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes
Flag salute ceremony

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element of its long-range General Plan (covering 2015-2040), celebrated Public Works Week by recognizing the departments that maintain roads, trees, facilities, and transportation, and acknowledged Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of General Plan through 2040
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions (streets, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation)
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month
Public Works Week recognition (May 17-23, 2026)

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss plans and developments related to the station area. The full agenda details were not included in the available meeting notice.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Met at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Meeting held in-person and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they made decisions on local development projects, approved a new city manager, and considered new city ordinances. The council conducted public hearings on several items including a development permit amendment and property assessments before voting on these matters.
keyTopics: Appointed a permanent City Manager
Approved a site development permit amendment and vesting tentative map
Considered new city ordinances on unspecified topics
Conducted public hearings on property assessments

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric appliances and heating systems in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations from the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification program principles and goals
Compliance with regional air quality regulations
Status update on switching homes from gas to electric systems
